compositionPolicy.semantics: Preserve visible labelling, editable combobox/listbox relationships, removable token names, repeat-name serialization, reset, validation, disabled, and read-only behavior.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: showSelectionSummary is independently removable; false removes its UI, live output, behavior, events, and accessibility relationship. maximum, token overflow, loading, retry, and pagination are separate opt-ins and never own remote transport.
